app/schemas/auth.py :: SignupRequest
class SignupRequest(BaseModel):
    email: EmailStr
    password: str = Field(min_length=8, max_length=128)
    full_name: str = Field(min_length=1, max_length=255)

app/schemas/auth.py :: LoginRequest
class LoginRequest(BaseModel):
    email: EmailStr
    password: str

app/schemas/auth.py :: UserBrief
class UserBrief(BaseModel):
    id: uuid.UUID
    email: str
    full_name: str
    avatar_url: str | None = None
    phone: str | None = None
    created_at: datetime

    model_config = {"from_attributes": True}

app/schemas/auth.py :: SendOtpRequest
class SendOtpRequest(BaseModel):
    phone: str = Field(min_length=8, max_length=32)
    # signup = new account only; login = existing phone only. Omit for legacy clients (flexible).
    intent: Literal["signup", "login"] | None = None

app/schemas/auth.py :: PhoneAuthData
class PhoneAuthData(BaseModel):
    """Tokens + user for phone OTP completion."""

    token: str
    access_token: str
    user: UserBrief | None = None
    needs_profile: bool = False

app/schemas/auth.py :: AppleSignInRequest
class AppleSignInRequest(BaseModel):
    identity_token: str
    authorization_code: str | None = None
    user_info: dict | None = None  # First-time sign in includes name

app/schemas/auth.py :: AuthResponse
class AuthResponse(BaseModel):
    access_token: str
    token_type: str = "bearer"
    user: UserBrief
